title: ioprint
text: ioprint Select the I/O messages sent to the message frame. IOprint { MessageLevel } Arguments MessageLevel —integer representing the sum of the message codes for the desired message types. If the sum of the codes is 0 , no information is placed in the message frame. For more information, see I/O Message Levels . Description The value specified overrides the current definition for the message level defined with /pri , or in the application shell. If the sum of codes is 0, no information is placed in the message frame. The following command sends the following messages to the message frame: Store sequence messages (code=1) Connector function calls (code=2) Fetch and Select return values (code=4) Open description block (code = 8) Example: The sum of the desired codes (1+2+4+8=15) is used for the requested Value . io 15 Copy Was this topic helpful?
